grep_parse_result_t(3) Library Functions Manual grep_parse_result_t(3)

NAME

grep_parse_result_t - Parsed pattern result from /pattern/flags syntax.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/log/grep.h>

Data Fields


char pattern [4096]
Parsed pattern string. uint32_t pcre2_options
PCRE2 compile options. bool is_fixed_string
True if fixed string (not regex). bool case_insensitive
Case-insensitive (i flag). bool invert
Invert match (I flag). bool global_flag
Highlight all matches (g flag). int context_before
Lines before match (B<n> flag). int context_after
Lines after match (A<n> flag). bool valid
True if parsing succeeded.

Detailed Description

Parsed pattern result from /pattern/flags syntax.

Shared between --grep CLI filtering and interactive grep.

Definition at line 18 of file grep.h.
